name: View Transitions — common mistakes
description: Avoid: bare VT without `default="none"` (cross-fades everything); directional VT in layout; fade-out exit with active morph; hand-rolled CSS instead of recipes; missing `default` key in type maps; type maps on suspense reveals; raw `viewTransitionName` as a substitute for `<ViewTransition>` triggers; expecting `update` for same-route param swaps (use `key`+`name`+`share`); duplicate `name` mounts; `router.back()` for animated VT; wrapping Suspense with a changing `key` causing refetch; layout VT blocking page VT; backdrop-blur flicker (hide old snapshot recipe).

metadata.intent: Triage silent or broken view transition behavior quickly

must_use: Prefer explicit defaults and explicit navigation tagging
must_not: Assume browser back or `router.back` participates in VT
conventions: When in doubt, log which transition types fired and which VT boundaries remounted.

steps.description: Search for `<ViewTransition>` without `default` — add `default="none"` unless you intentionally want global cross-fade.
Remove persistent layout wrappers that own type-keyed VT when child pages also wrap with VT.
Replace animated back stacks that rely on `router.back()` with explicit `router.push` targets.
